import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import '../styles/Dashboard.css'; function Dashboard() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [userName, setUserName] = useState(''); const [isSidebarOpen, setIsSidebarOpen] = useState(false); const [showAnimation, setShowAnimation] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { const user_id = localStorage.getItem('user_id'); if (!user_id) { navigate('/'); return; } const fetchUserData = async () => { try { const response = await fetch(`http://localhost:5000/api/user-data/${user_id}`); if (!response.ok) { throw new Error('Failed to fetch user data'); } const data = await response.json(); if (data.name) { setUserName(data.name); } } catch (error) { console.error('Error fetching user data:', error); } }; fetchUserData(); // Trigger animation after component mounts setTimeout(() => { setShowAnimation(true); }, 100); }, [navigate]); const handleLogout = () => { localStorage.removeItem('user_id'); navigate('/'); }; const toggleSidebar = () => { setIsSidebarOpen(!isSidebarOpen); }; return (
{/* Top Bar */}

Asthma Monitoring System

Welcome, {userName}!

{/* Dashboard Content */}
{/* App Information Section */}

About Asthma Monitoring App

Purpose

The Asthma Monitoring App is designed to help individuals with asthma track their condition, predict potential exacerbations, and maintain better control over their respiratory health. By combining personal health data with advanced machine learning algorithms, we provide timely insights and recommendations to improve quality of life.

Key Features

  • Health Data Recording - Track lung function metrics (FEV1, FVC, PEF), symptoms, and vital signs in one place
  • Exacerbation Risk Prediction - Get personalized risk assessments based on your health data using neural network technology
  • Medication Management - Monitor your medication intake and adherence
  • Trend Analysis - Visualize your health progress through interactive graphs
  • Personalized Recommendations - Receive tailored advice based on your specific condition and risk level

How to Use

  1. Recording Indicators - Regularly input your health measurements and symptoms
  2. Check Your Risk - Visit the Exacerbation Forecast page to get a personalized risk assessment
  3. Track Your Progress - Use the Graphs of Changes to monitor improvements over time
  4. Manage Medications - Log and track your prescribed medications in the Medication Diary
  5. Stay Consistent - For best results, record your data at regular intervals

Technology

Our app utilizes a neural network model trained on comprehensive asthma patient data to predict exacerbation risks. The model analyzes over 20 different health indicators and provides personalized risk assessments with up to 85% accuracy. All predictions are accompanied by explanations of the key factors influencing your risk level.

Privacy & Security

Your health data security is our priority. All personal information is encrypted and stored securely. The app complies with healthcare data regulations, and your data will never be shared with third parties without your explicit consent.

{/* Quick Access Section */}

Quick Access
